experiment: ADR-138 — quantifying the micro-evolve fitness noise floor
metric: corpus resolve count (0..3) per repeated run
verdict: noise quantified: noisy: deepseek/wholefile/a1 → 2/3,2/3,2/3,1/3,2/3 (mean 1.8, sd 0.4, range [1,2]) | stable?: gemini/searchreplace/a2 → 2/3,2/3,3/3 (mean 2.33, sd 0.47, range [2,3]) — a single run is unreliable where sd is large; averaging ~⌈(sd/0.5)²⌉ runs is needed for a 0.5-resolve-stable signal (ADR-137).
